anniversary: 10th annual gathering, 10-year anniversary of the House of Beautiful Business
participant_profile: Senior business professionals, founders, designers, and creatives; predominantly European, highly educated, philosophically literate. Self-selected at ~€1,895 entry. 40+ countries, skewing 35-55. Comfortable with foreign-language vocabulary, interdisciplinary thinking, and emotional openness unusual for a business audience. Embedded in the corporate system (SAP, Google, BCG, Porsche, Chanel represented) while critiquing it. Romantic reformists — business should be reimagined, not abolished.
tagline: The most human gathering for the more-than-human world.
session_role_for_ai_assembly: AIssembly night-shift deliberation within the AI Democracy Marathon. A cohort of AI agents embodying historical, philosophical, literary, and non-human figures takes over overnight while human participants rest or celebrate; by morning, a curated package of artifacts (songs, dialogues, shaders, river testimony, etc.) is delivered to participants as breakfast reading.
conference_context_paragraph: World Beautiful Business Forum, Athens, May 2026. 12-voice AI Assembly deliberating overnight on conference sessions about more-than-human democracy, beautiful business, and the future of governance.
notes_for_stage_0: Use conference_context_paragraph verbatim for the voice config's conference_context field. Use participant_profile and tagline for audience targeting when Stage 0 proposes voice_mode. Use panel_members_final to explicitly tell Stage 0 NOT to speculate about other Assembly members in its DR prompt — the DR output should be scholarship, not panel synthesis.
